notes: All 9 GLM-9B responses are normal-mode, non-hallucinatory scene descriptions (no Waldo characters located). They consistently nail the blue-and-white striped huts, umbrella colors, sailboat sail colors, steamships, and the large blue-and-white vessel on the right. Common omissions across reps: the red-and-white Punch-and-Judy booth (only t0.7|rep0 and t0.7|rep1 flag it), horses near water (only t0.1|rep0), and the distant land/hills on the horizon (only t0.4|rep1). The single notable hallucination is t0.7|rep1's 'cross on top' of the right vessel (a misread of the hovercraft's lift fans). t0.4|rep1 ranks highest for uniquely catching the verified horizon landmass.
